rivers.source_context: USGS-11445500 planning presets plus guide-review requirement

variants.hydraulic_feature_expectation: Expose more rocks and shallows; reduce foam and sticky hydraulics unless guide review identifies low-water holes.
promotion_blockers: Attached evidence is only a 30-day early-summer CDEC context window.
A25 X-flag meaning and station-to-reach routing remain unresolved.
Guide/outfitter review and lifelike capture evidence are missing.

required_captures.review_requirement: Capture this exact river/flow/view combination from Unreal and keep the selected flow band recorded in the manifest before using the image for flow-specific art, guide, hazard, or performance review.

variants.current_decision: Band-named guide-seat and river-eye Unreal captures are attached for this variant, but do not promote it until the intake ledger blockers plus guide/geospatial, hazard/readability, rights, solver/forcing nonmasking, and measured performance review are closed.

variants.hydraulic_feature_expectation: Default commercial-style validation band with readable tongues, wet rocks, eddy lines, and moderate wave trains.
promotion_blockers: Seasonal representativeness is not proven.
Release routing and guide interpretation remain open.
No low/median/high capture variant set has been rendered and reviewed.

variants.hydraulic_feature_expectation: Stronger laterals, wave trains, eddy-line shear, faster raft response, and high wet-bank marks while keeping boulder hazards visible.

Requires separate runoff or release evidence.
Requires guide review before high-water visuals or forcing can be authoritative.

rivers.source_context: USGS-09380000, USGS-09402500, and Glen Canyon Dam release context are required before these planning values become authoritative.

variants.hydraulic_feature_expectation: More exposed bars and sharper ferry setup while preserving big-water scale and swimmer visibility.
promotion_blockers: Daily release totals do not capture hourly hydropower fluctuations.
Gauge lag and river-mile routing assumptions remain open.
Sandbar/wet-bank masks and oarsman review are missing.
